title: ipomoea hildebrandtii subsp. grantii
intro: Ipomoea hildebrandtii subsp. grantii, also known as Grant's morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Grant's morning glory include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, skin conditions, and fever.
